features: Skill shot system (plunger power zones: GOOD/GREAT/PERFECT for 5K-25K bonus)
Named combo tiers: WARM UP → GETTING HOT → ON FIRE → BLAZING → UNSTOPPABLE → GODLIKE
Progressive super jackpot (3 jackpots charges, ramp triggers 100K+ escalating)
Ball save extension (first ramp shot extends saver by 5s)
Captive ball obstacle (upper-right, spring physics, escalating score per hit)
Controls/How To Play panel (VR + keyboard controls, scoring reference, gameplay tips)
Match sequence post-game (2-digit match = free credit)
Skill shot zone visual indicators on plunger lane
HUD combo tier display and super jackpot indicator
Updated title screen with HOW TO PLAY button
